title: Will the **high temp in Austin** be 92-93° on Mar 22, 2026?
rules_primary: If the highest temperature recorded in Austin Bergstrom for March 22, 2026 as reported by the National Weather Service's Climatological Report (Daily), is between 92-93°, then the market resolves to Yes.
